story_summary: Keyword mapping direct-assign: optional bypass AI and assign category directly
pack_selection_rationale: Narrow follow-up to existing keyword mapping feature (US-0004 review queue already covers AI comparison). Stack/runtime cues known (Node.js categorizer, CategoryMappingService, App.js).
assumption_confirmation_quoted: Operator can toggle direct assign per keyword mapping in admin UI. When enabled and keywords match category assigned immediately AI not called. When disabled existing hint behavior unchanged. Delegation: tests_acceptance_checks delegated to discovery.

topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: INTERSPAR 2361 K4 03.06. 21:06 transaction with keyword mapping Supermarkets & Groceries -> Groceries should assign directly when direct-assign enabled, no AI call needed
CategoryMappingService.js, App.js #resolveCategory, public/index.html, keyword mapping data model, REST endpoints

Account mapping still highest precedence (step 1 beats everything). Backward-compatible additive boolean directAssign default false, existing mappings without flag continue as AI-hint, schema change backward compatible, direct-assign target must exist in Firefly

topic_coverage.delegation_rationale: PO defines what must be tested (direct-assign match AI not called, direct-assign miss falls through to AI, mixed scenario) but not implementation details
topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Test design delegated to discovery/architecture. PO defines: direct-assign match AI not called, direct-assign miss falls through to AI, mixed scenario

Operator can toggle direct assign per keyword mapping in admin UI. When enabled and keywords match category assigned immediately AI not called. When disabled existing hint behavior unchanged. Delegation: tests_acceptance_checks delegated to discovery.

decomposition.rationale: Bounded vertical slice: data model toggle + service logic + pipeline integration + UI toggle + tests
decomposition.alternative_rejected: Splitting service change vs UI toggle vs tests — would deliver incomplete value without end-to-end coverage

duplicate_check.notes: No existing story covers keyword mapping direct-assign. US-0004 covers review queue (AI vs history), not keyword hard-assign.
